debug_info.goal:
a : Type
x : a
xs : List a
ih : xs = fromRA (Chapter3.toRA a xs)
ds : List (Digit a)
⊢ x :: (concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm) (Digit.zero :: ds) =
    (concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm)
      (consRA.consT (Tree.leaf x) (List.foldr consRA nilRA ((concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm) (Digit.zero :: ds))))

failed_attempts:
(try induction ds <;> simp_all [concat1, List.map, List.foldr, fromRA.frm, Digit.add])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [concat1, List.map, List.foldr, fromRA.frm, Digit.add])
    <;>
    (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all [concat1, List.map, List.foldr, fromRA.frm, Digit.add])
    <;>
    (try aesop)
  rw [h₂]
  <;>
  (try aesop)
  <;>
  (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all [concat1, List.map, List.foldr, fromRA.frm, Digit.add])

<;> simp_all [List.cons_map]
      <;> try cases ds <;> simp_all [List.cons_map]
      <;> try aesop

try cases ds <;> simp_all [Digit]
